typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-serif
typography.label: text-xs font-sans uppercase tracking-[0.2em]

layout_and_spacing.alignment: optical alignment preferred. Headings left-aligned or centered based on section balance.

surface_strategies.header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0F1A15]/80 border-b border-[#F4A623]/10 sticky top-0 z-50
surface_strategies.card: bg-[#1B4332]/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-[#F4A623]/20 shadow-2xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300

components_instructions.animations: framer-motion for page transitions and scroll reveals
components_instructions.whatsapp_floating: fixed bottom-8 right-8 z-[100] bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-lg hover:scale-110 transition-transform cursor-pointer flex items-center justify-center
components_instructions.parallax_hero: use standard CSS background-attachment: fixed or framer-motion scroll y-transform for parallax effect on the hero background image.

logo.description: Minimalist luxury gold logo for Panshi Restaurants
logo.placement: Header navigation, footer, and admin sidebar

hero_background.description: Cinematic dark food photography of a lavish Bengali feast
hero_background.placement: Homepage hero section with parallax and bg-black/50 overlay

food_dishes.placement: Featured Dishes Carousel or Menu Item 1
Featured Dishes Carousel or Menu Item 2
Featured Dishes Carousel or Menu Item 3
Featured Dishes Carousel or Menu Item 4

blog_and_people.placement: Blog featured image or Reviews background

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow the color palette strictly. Use #0F1A15 for the main background to set the dark/rich mood.
Implement the 'Optical Clarity' glassmorphism for the header (bg-[#0F1A15]/80 backdrop-blur-xl).
Use Playfair Display (font-serif) for all headings, ensuring tight tracking and never exceeding text-6xl for H1.
Use Nunito (font-sans) for body text and labels.
Do NOT center everything. Opt for asymmetrical 'bento' layouts for sections like About or Services.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs).
Ensure high contrast on hover states, e.g., text color must remain visible on hover.
For the hero image, apply a max bg-black/50 overlay to ensure the image remains visible but text is legible. Apply a parallax effect on scroll.
Include a floating WhatsApp button fixed to the bottom right with a clear #25D366 color to break the palette purely for conversion focus.
For the Admin panel, use a dense, data-heavy grid (control room grid) with a slightly darker background for the sidebar to create hierarchy.
Never use placehold.it or similar. Use the images provided in the media section of this JSON.
Configure Tailwind with the fonts: extend fontFamily in tailwind.config.js with serif: ['Playfair Display', 'serif'] and sans: ['Nunito', 'sans-serif'].
Menu should reflect Food Panda style items but visually upgraded to match the luxury dark theme.
